zh.lifeSummary: 當Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc於大約1125年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克時，她的父親Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar49歲，母親Gisèle de Vaudémont37歲。她和Hugues lll De Broyes至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1178年3月12日在法國享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc于大约1125年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克时，她的父亲Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar49岁，母亲Gisèle de Vaudémont37岁。她和Hugues lll De Broyes至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1178年3月12日在法国享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stéphanie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Stéphanie, vernacular form of Latin Stephania, a variant of Stephana, which was in use among early Christians as a feminine form of Stephanus ( see Stephen ). It is very popular in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc was born about 1125, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, her father, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, was 49 and her mother, Gisèle de Vaudémont, was 37. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Hugues lll De Broyes. She died on 12 March 1178, in France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc est née environ 1125, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, son père, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Gisèle de Vaudémont, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Hugues lll De Broyes. Elle est décédée le 12 mars 1178, à France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc um 1125 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 49 und ihre Mutter Gisèle de Vaudémont 37. Sie hatte mit Hugues lll De Broyes mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. März 1178 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc è nata il circa 1125 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, sua padre, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Gisèle de Vaudémont, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Hugues lll De Broyes. Morì il 12 marzo 1178, nel Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stéphanie De Bar-le-Ducが約1125年にフランスグランド エストメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barは49歳，母Gisèle de Vaudémontは37歳であった。彼女はHugues lll De Broyesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1178年3月12日にフランスで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc(이)가 대략 1125년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisèle de Vaudémont(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Hugues lll De Broyes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 3월 12일 프랑스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Hugues lll De Broyes. Ela faleceu em 12 de março de 1178, em França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc родилась около 1125 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, гранд эст, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisèle de Vaudémont, 37. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Hugues lll De Broyes. Она умерла 12 марта 1178 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stéphanie De Bar-le-Duc nació aproximadamente 1125, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Gisèle de Vaudémont, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Hugues lll De Broyes. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1178, en Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
